name: 反差身份開場
description: 九天玄女穿越到被全家嫌棄的醜女身上，天界最尊貴的存在變成凡間最卑微的棄女，極致反差激發觀眾的逆襲期待。

examples.drama_title: Witch transmigrated to ugly wife, fam hears her inner voice! rise all the way, become CEO's fave!
examples.excerpt: Oh my blind and heartless future crippled and sent flying bedridden losing control of his bowels and bladder. Husband Ro Wong... Don't call me mom. I'm not your mother. You fake... How could I give birth to an ugly girl like you?
